items.title: US to release emergency oil reserves as prices rise
items.summary: Oil reserve release as prices rise.
items.lede: The United States said it would release emergency oil reserves as fuel prices rose.
items.body_preview: Officials described the release as a response to price pressure and shipping concerns.

items.summary: Oil reserve release amid fuel price fears.
items.lede: Governments announced an emergency oil reserve release as fuel price fears spread.
items.body_preview: The release is meant to stabilize prices and calm energy markets.

items.title: West Bank settlers face sanctions review
